word: H7304 - רָוַח - râvach - raw-vakh' - Be refreshed

sections.paragraph:
Original: רוח

Transliteration: râvach

Phonetic: raw-vakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be wide, be spacious, breathe
    1. (Qal) to breathe easily, be relieved
    2. (Pual) spacious (participle)

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H7306]

TWOT entry: 2132

Part(s) of speech: Verb
